text: Built backend systems for 4 production applications across healthcare, education, and AI.
Improved background task throughput by 40% using Celery and Redis.
Reduced video loading time by 50% using AWS MediaConvert, Lambda, and CloudFront.
Implemented secure payment workflows using Razorpay webhooks and asynchronous verification.
Worked extensively with AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, CloudFront, MediaConvert, EventBridge).
Guided interns and junior developers through onboarding, code reviews, and backend best practices.
Built scalable REST APIs supporting real-world users and production deployments.
Collaborated with the hardware team on R&D for the Nadiswara device, validating sensor data, optimizing signal processing workflows, and enabling reliable backend integration.
